code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
mut found = false
mut i = 0
while i < lines.len() and not found
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      print(trimmed)
      found = true
    end
  when None
    found = found
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not found
  print("(none)")
end
